translation.notFound.title: Page not found
translation.notFound.description: The requested page does not exist, has moved, or the address is incorrect.
translation.home.heroSubtitle: API-Route is an OpenAI-compatible multi-model AI API gateway. Use one Base URL and API key to call GPT, Claude, Gemini, and other leading models while managing pricing, balance, plans, and usage logs in one place.
translation.home.whyChooseUsDesc: Everything you need to build AI-powered applications
translation.home.supportTitle: We are here whenever you need us
translation.home.supportDesc: For setup, top-ups, subscriptions, or API issues, reach us by email or Telegram and a real person will help you as soon as possible.
translation.home.lightningFastDesc: Optimized routing and caching deliver responses with minimal latency. Load-balanced across multiple providers for maximum reliability.
translation.home.securePrivateDesc: Enterprise-grade security with encrypted API keys. No request logging by default. Your data stays your data.
translation.home.payAsYouGoDesc: Transparent pricing with no hidden fees. Only pay for what you use. Multiple top-up options and subscription packages available.
translation.home.availableModelsDesc: Access {{count}} AI models through one OpenAI-compatible API
translation.home.choosePlan: Choose a plan that fits your needs
translation.home.readyToStartDesc: Create your account and start building with AI in minutes. No credit card required.
translation.home.apiEndpointsDesc: After creating an API key, use any of these URLs. Pick the endpoint closest to your network.
translation.home.apiEndpointClickToCopy: Click an address to copy it
translation.home.heroBadge: OpenAI-compatible API gateway / one Base URL / GPT Claude Gemini
translation.home.heroTitle: One API for the world's leading AI models
translation.home.instantActivation: One Base URL and API key
translation.home.workflowTitle: Start calling the API in three steps
translation.home.stepBuyDesc: Add balance with online payment or a voucher.
translation.home.stepRedeemDesc: After the balance arrives, subscribe to a package only if you need one.
translation.home.stepCreateKeyDesc: Copy the API key and endpoint into your product, coding tools, or automation workflows.
translation.home.platformTitle: Want to turn AI API access into your own reseller site?
translation.home.platformDesc: Launch a branded AI API reseller platform with domain, model pricing, top-ups, plans, user management, and usage records.
translation.home.audienceTitle: Built for teams that need a multi-model AI API gateway
translation.home.audienceSubtitle: Whether you are adding models to a product, configuring Claude Code, VS Code, LibreChat, creative workflows, or your own AI API platform, you can manage everything with one Base URL, API key, and plan system.
translation.home.audienceDevelopersDesc: Use an OpenAI-compatible API to connect GPT, Claude, Gemini, and other models to one project without constantly changing SDKs, keys, or providers.
translation.home.audienceSaasDesc: Add GPT, Claude, Gemini, and other models through one multi-model AI API gateway while keeping pricing, plans, and usage logs easy to understand.
translation.home.audienceCodingToolsDesc: Configure an OpenAI-compatible Base URL, API key, and model name in your coding tools, or import a gpt5.5 profile with cc switch.
translation.home.audienceCreatorsDesc: Connect Cherry Studio, LibreChat, scripts, or workflows to one unified AI API and call multiple models from one account.
translation.home.audienceRelayDesc: Launch a branded AI API reseller site with your own domain, model pricing, top-ups, promotion, and user management.
translation.register.fillRequired: Please fill in all required fields
translation.dashboard.manageDesc: Manage your API usage, keys, and account
translation.notifications.title: Announcements
translation.notifications.subtitle: Latest updates from the site owner
translation.appMarket.title: OpenAI-Compatible Clients and AI Apps
translation.appMarket.subtitle: Find AI apps and OpenAI-compatible clients that connect to API-Route with one Base URL, API key, and model name, including LibreChat, Claude Code, VS Code, and creative workflows.
translation.appMarket.clientDesc: Use the same API-Route Base URL, API key, and model names across clients that support custom OpenAI-compatible endpoints.
translation.appMarket.clientBaseUrlDesc: Paste the API-Route endpoint as the Base URL, then use your API key and a model name from the Pricing page.
translation.appMarket.clientLibreChatDesc: Add API-Route as an OpenAI-compatible endpoint in LibreChat and route chat, agents, files, and MCP usage through your account.
translation.appMarket.clientClaudeCodeDesc: Configure Base URL, API key, and model name manually, or import a ready profile with cc switch.
translation.appMarket.toonflowDescription: Turn novels, scripts, and ideas into animated short dramas with AI writing, storyboards, character generation, and video production.
translation.appMarket.canvasDescription: Create images, edit references, generate videos, manage prompts, arrange assets, and collaborate in one infinite canvas.
translation.appMarket.productPageDescription: Upload product images, analyze product details, generate structured high-conversion hero images and product pages, and edit modules directly.
translation.appMarket.librechatDescription: Connect multiple AI models through an OpenAI-compatible Base URL with support for Agents, MCP, Artifacts, code interpreter, file chat, search, and multi-user authentication.
translation.appMarket.moreComingDesc: When new AI apps go live, their entrance, source code, images, and usage notes will be shown here.
translation.subDist.dashboardEntry: Launch a branded AI API platform you can price and promote
translation.subDist.title: Launch Your Own AI API Platform
translation.subDist.subtitle: Use {{name}}'s hosted capabilities to launch an independent AI API platform that can be visited, paid into, priced, and promoted. After payment, management access is enabled automatically and setup continues.
translation.subDist.exampleTitle: See what this site already looks like
translation.subDist.exampleDesc: {{name}} already supports branding, top-ups, model sales, and user management. Your platform runs on the same hosted capability.
translation.subDist.exampleNote: You are not only getting an admin account. You are launching an AI API management platform that can be visited, accept payments, set prices, and be promoted.
translation.subDist.notAvailable: Branded platform setup is currently unavailable
translation.subDist.disabledFallback: Please contact the site administrator to enable this feature
translation.subDist.loginHint: Please log in or register on this site first. After payment succeeds, this account will automatically receive management access for the new platform.
translation.subDist.siteSlugHelp: This will become your platform identifier and cannot be changed after payment.
translation.subDist.postPayHint: After payment, activation is automatic. If login is required, use the same account to continue setup.
translation.subDist.cryptoHint: Please transfer using the details below. Your AI API platform will be activated automatically after confirmation and setup will begin.
translation.subDist.priceSummary: This is the actual setup price configured by this site's owner. After payment succeeds, the system activates your branded platform automatically and enters setup.
translation.subDist.rule1: An AI API management platform that can be visited independently, customized with your brand, and topped up online.
translation.subDist.rule2: After activation, you can configure the domain, site name, logo, announcements, theme, and model pricing.
translation.subDist.rule3: Customer management, top-ups, packages, and model sales are enabled with the site and managed from the admin console.
translation.subDist.loginRequired: Please log in before launching your platform
translation.subDist.fillRequired: Please fill in the site name, slug, and payment method
translation.subDist.paymentPageOpened: Launch order created. Please complete payment on the opened payment page.
translation.subDist.paymentPageFailed: Failed to open the payment page. Please try again later or contact the site administrator.
translation.subDist.popupBlocked: The browser blocked the payment window. Please allow pop-ups and try again.
translation.subDist.cryptoOrderCreated: Crypto order created. Please complete the transfer using the details on this page.
translation.subDist.paymentPending: Returned to this page. If you have completed payment, platform activation will finish after the callback is confirmed. Please refresh shortly.
translation.subDist.alreadyOpenDesc: Platform {{name}} has been activated. Use the same account in the main console to continue setup.
translation.tokens.title: API Keys
translation.tokens.subtitle: Manage your API access tokens
translation.tokens.name: Name
translation.tokens.keyWarning: This is the only time you'll see this key. Copy it now and store it securely.
translation.tokens.noKeysHint: Click a card above to create one
translation.tokens.selectGroupSubtitle: Choose a model group and rate, click a card to create
translation.tokens.defaultGroupDesc: No provider restriction, uses all available channels
translation.tokens.noSupportedModels: No available models for this key
translation.tokens.quickStartComment: # Use your API key with OpenAI-compatible endpoint
translation.tokens.groupPricingSubtitle: Shows anonymous reference prices and price ranges for this group without exposing provider names.
translation.tokens.groupPricingNotice: Actual billing dynamically selects from currently available routes in this group. Prices below are for reference only.
translation.tokens.groupPricingNoData: No reference pricing is available for this group yet.
translation.config.title: Config File Export
translation.config.subtitle: Select your API Key and model to generate config files
translation.config.loginPrompt: Log in to generate your config
translation.config.loginDesc: Select your API Key and model to auto-fill config files
translation.config.noKeyDesc: Config files will be generated once you have a key
translation.config.apiUrlHint: After creating an API key, you can connect directly with the Base URLs below. Click any address to copy it.
translation.config.currentToolApiUrl: Recommended Base URL for current tool
translation.config.ccswitchHint: Pick the destination app and import into CC Switch directly without switching the export tool first.
translation.config.ccswitchNotInstalledDesc: If CC Switch already opened, you can ignore this. Otherwise, install it first and try the quick import again.
translation.downloads.title: Quick Installers
translation.downloads.subtitle: This site does not host installers. Choose your platform to open the official download page and get the latest version.
translation.pricing.title: AI API Pricing Comparison and Token Costs
translation.pricing.subtitle: Compare GPT, Claude, Gemini, and other model rates across input tokens, output tokens, cache, and per-call pricing, then estimate AI API token cost by workload.
translation.packages.title: AI API Plans and Packages
translation.packages.subtitle: Compare daily, weekly, monthly, and quota-based AI API plans for one OpenAI-compatible API. Choose a package by quota, validity period, model access, and use case.
translation.packages.noPackages: No packages available at the moment.
translation.packages.insufficientBalance: Insufficient balance. Please top up before subscribing.
translation.packages.subscriptionInfo: This is a subscription ({{period}}), valid for {{days}} days. Each period grants {{symbol}}{{amount}} quota. Unused quota expires.
translation.packages.purchaseFlow: Compare API plans, top up balance, then subscribe
translation.packages.planPeriodDescriptionOne: Valid for 1 day. Any unused quota expires at the end of the plan period.
translation.packages.planPeriodDescriptionOther: Valid for {{count}} days. Any unused quota expires at the end of the plan period.
translation.common.sessionExpired: Session expired, please log in again
translation.account.title: Account Settings
translation.account.subtitle: View account details and update your login password
translation.account.passwordSame: New password must be different from the current password
translation.topup.title: Account Top-up
translation.topup.subtitle: Add balance with supported payment methods. Your balance can be used for API calls and subscriptions.
translation.topup.redeemHeading: Enter a voucher and credit your balance
translation.topup.packageModeDesc: Redeemed value only credits account balance.
translation.topup.balanceModeDesc: Keep the redeemed value in your account without buying a package.
translation.topup.redeemBalanceHeading: Enter a code to top up your balance
translation.topup.balanceRedeemed: Voucher redeemed. Your balance has been credited.
translation.topup.stepBuyDesc: Top up your account balance online or with a voucher.
translation.topup.stepRedeemDesc: Paste the voucher code and submit it.
translation.topup.stepActivateDesc: After the balance is credited, you decide whether to buy a package.
translation.topup.balanceStepBuyDesc: Each unit costs ¥1, so the quantity is the balance amount.
translation.topup.balanceStepRedeemDesc: Paste the balance voucher and submit it.
translation.topup.balanceStepCreditDesc: The value stays in your account and no package is purchased.
translation.topup.stepChoosePackageDesc: After the balance is credited, you can decide whether to buy a package.
translation.topup.automaticActivationDesc: A successful redemption only credits account balance and never subscribes automatically.
translation.topup.balanceDirectCreditDesc: A balance voucher only increases your available account balance.
translation.topup.balanceOptionHint: Online top-ups and vouchers both credit account balance. Buy packages separately on the Packages page.
translation.topup.customAmountHint: Custom amounts are automatically aligned to payable tiers so the entered and charged amounts stay consistent.
translation.topup.minimumAmount: Top-up amount cannot be lower than {{min}}
translation.topup.creemUnsupportedAmount: Current amount is not supported by Creem. Use a multiple of the configured Creem product quota.
translation.topup.redeemShopHint: Vouchers only credit balance. Buy packages separately on the Packages page.
translation.topup.packageActivationFailed: The voucher value was credited. Buy a package separately from the Packages page.
translation.topup.pendingPackageActivation: {{name}} is awaiting activation. The voucher value remains in your account.
translation.topup.codeAmountMismatch: The voucher value does not match the selected package. The value remains in your account; please contact support.
translation.topup.cryptoSelectionHint: Choose the blockchain and token first, then click the button below to generate a payment address.
translation.topup.inviteSubtitle: Invite friends and earn ongoing rewards
translation.topup.withdrawSubtitle: Submit a payout request with your preferred payment method
translation.topup.withdrawRemarkPlaceholder: Enter your payout account or extra notes
translation.topup.invalidWithdrawAmount: Please enter a valid withdrawal amount
translation.topup.withdrawExceedsBalance: Withdrawal amount cannot exceed your withdrawable balance
translation.topup.currentCommissionRateDesc: All regular users get a default {{rate}}% referral reward. Payout and settlement follow the current promotion rules.
translation.topup.kolApplyTitle: Apply for a Higher Reward Rate
translation.topup.kolApplyDesc: Your default reward rate is {{rate}}%. If you have promotion resources, you can submit your profile to apply for a higher partner rate.
translation.topup.kolPendingDesc: Your request has been submitted. If approved, your reward rate will be updated.
translation.topup.kolApprovedDesc: You are currently using a custom reward rate approved through review.
translation.topup.kolRejectedFallback: The request was not approved yet. You can improve your materials and apply again.
translation.topup.kolApplyModalTitle: Apply for a Higher Reward Rate
translation.topup.kolApplyModalDesc: Submit your promotion profile and your reward rate will be updated after approval.
translation.topup.kolSocialPlaceholder: Enter your profile, channel, or account link
translation.topup.kolPlanPlaceholder: Tell us how you plan to promote this site
translation.topup.kolApplySuccess: Application submitted. Please wait for review.
translation.dashboard.topupDesc: Top up online or redeem a voucher to balance
translation.dashboard.analyticsSubtitle: Usage, cost, model, and API key activity for the selected period
translation.logs.title: Call Logs
translation.logs.subtitle: View detailed records of every API call
translation.tasks.title: Task Records
translation.tasks.subtitle: View submitted video and image generation tasks, progress, and results
translation.invoice.title: Invoice Request
translation.invoice.description: Only non-mainland China entities are supported. Invoice amounts are calculated in USD. Invoices are sent manually to the recipient email. Creem payments should be invoiced in Creem.
translation.invoice.feeCountsNext: Paid invoice service fees count toward the next invoiceable spending amount.
translation.invoice.amountBelowMin: Invoice amount cannot be less than {{amount}}
translation.invoice.amountExceedsAvailable: Invoice amount exceeds the available invoiceable amount (USD)
translation.invoice.mainlandUnsupported: Only non-mainland China entities can request invoices
translation.invoice.addressRequired: Enter the registered or billing address
